step.title: Cleaning up temp folders from previous zip deployments and extracting pushed zip file /tmp/zipdeploy/867ae94d-e80a-473e-8550-83463612a48a.zip (0.12 MB) to /tmp/zipdeploy/extracted

step.title: Warning
step.text:
Exception in parallel rsync: ExitCode: 123, Output: Run rsync from: /tmp/zipdeploy/extracted/ to: /home/site/wwwroot/ in 8 parallel threads Delete options: clean=False, use manifest=True, directory to ignore= Prev manifest = /opt/Kudu/Scripts/firstDeploymentManifest and next /home/site/deployments/997ced4c-55e8-417d-95d4-3f215a9ff22f/manifest Cleaning up /tmp//filelist.txt and /tmp//splits Creating a list of all files at /tmp//filelist.txt No directory to exclude. Created /tmp//filelist.txt. Total number of files to be synced = 17. Created batches from the list of files. Processing 3 files in each thread Running rsync for filelist /tmp//splits/split.ab from /tmp/zipdeploy/extracted/ to /home/site/wwwroot/ Running rsync for filelist /tmp//splits/split.aa from /tmp/zipdeploy/extracted/ to /home/site/wwwroot/ Running rsync for filelist /tmp//splits/split.ac from /tmp/zipdeploy/extracted/ to /home/site/wwwroot/ Running rsync for filelist /tmp//splits/split.ad from /tmp/zipdeploy/extracted/ to /home/site/wwwroot/ Running rsync for filelist /tmp//splits/split.ae from /tmp/zipdeploy/extracted/ to /home/site/wwwroot/ Running rsync for filelist /tmp//splits/split.af from /tmp/zipdeploy/extracted/ to /home/site/wwwroot/
